content_body: We highly enjoyed this cabin for our fall break and birthday celebration. We loved the hot tub, played pool and watched movies. We caught some monster fish with Blue Ridge Fly Fishing, walked on railroad tracks and enjoyed a bonfire with smores. We also enjoyed shopping in town. We highly recommend The Vault and the New German Deli. Our favorite parts of the trip included playing pool and just being together. We had great family time while enjoying the view. Thank you for an amazing cabin! We had much needed hang time with our three teenage boys.
title: Amazing Cabin!
